---
title: "LLMs are not for everything: A Dataset and Comparative Study on Argument Strength Classification"
author: "Djouvas, C., Charalampous, A., Christodoulou, C.J., and Tsapatsoulis, N."
date: 2025-01-01
description: "Proceedings of the 28th Pan-Hellenic Conference on Progress in Computing and Informatics, 437–443"
categories: [Public Opinion and Argument Mining]
image: images_publications/conference.png
---
